hd27760c8g5357g4f14gb62fg57b642f8b7ce: And they're going to kill the goblins, too.
h433002a8gfbc2g4d4cga0c1gf11d58e449c9: We'll get out of here. You'll see.
hf27350begfaa3g4ca0ga620g6545b31eb0b7: And all the grown-ups and everyone will be all right.
he9026815g505bg47b8g8e0bgf6f2b9b373b3: I was so scared I just hid.
ha9470befgf342g4ab9g864eg47c20b253848: But when I looked up, the harpy was gone!
hbd5286ffge7f6g4f57g945cg78fa1345eb35: Because that person was a monster hunter, and they killed it!
h21b6adb9g6f07g42aagb41fg8a5679df579f: And the voice started screaming - saying that I was hers!
h43b6fbb0gfda7g4591ga349g136fe80178ee: And when I looked up, there was a harpy, ready to tear me to shreds.
he6f2d229geb12g4d83g96eag7c0cc5c3d572: And the beach was empty, but there was this... soft music.
h032fcabbgc083g4b5eg824dg303de6d15570: It was really beautiful. And a voice was saying that everything would be all right.

h53e74151ge308g4070g8621g9502240e4b09: Everything felt so nice. I just wanted to get closer.
